title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information about a summer music festival.
audio_script: Man: Hello, and welcome to this short talk about our summer music festival. It’s bigger than last year, so please listen carefully to the information. The festival is usually in June, but this year it will be in [14]July[/14], when more students are free to help. The main concerts will take place in the old [15]castle[/15]. It sounds unusual, but the walls make the music sound wonderful. There will be food stalls outside, but please bring your own [16]water[/16] because drinks can be expensive there. Volunteers must wear a [17]green[/17] shirt on the day. We used red shirts last year, but people found them difficult to see in the crowd. If you are helping at the festival, please meet first in the town [18]park[/18] at half past ten. From there, we’ll walk together to the festival area. Each volunteer will receive [19]four[/19] free tickets for family or friends. You can collect these from me after the meeting today. We still need more people to help with parking, so please put your name on the list if you’re interested. The programme will include school bands in the afternoon and more experienced musicians in the evening. You can come for only part of the day if you are busy, but volunteers should tell us their times before Friday. There will be a first-aid point near the stage, and lost property will be kept at the information tent. Please remind visitors that dogs are not allowed inside the concert area.  If you are performing, please arrive early so the sound team can check microphones before the audience begins to come in.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the festival will be in July this year.
The speaker says the main concerts will take place in the old castle.
The speaker says visitors should bring their own water.
The speaker says volunteers must wear a green shirt.
The speaker says volunteers should meet in the town park.
The speaker says each volunteer will receive four free tickets.
